items.title: Popular sugar substitutes linked to faster brain aging
items.summary: Several popular sugar substitutes may not be as harmless as they seem. Adults who consumed the most artificial sweeteners showed substantially faster declines in memory and thinking, especially if they were under 60 or had diabetes. items.title: Intermittent fasting helped people keep weight off for a year
